title: olgasis gauntlettii
side_effects: Olgasis gauntlettii can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach pain due to its high concentration of toxic alkaloids. Prolonged use can also lead to liver damage and kidney failure in some individuals, resulting in symptoms like fatigue, weakness, and dark urine. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can cause respiratory problems, including shortness of breath and wheezing, especially for those with pre-existing conditions. If left untreated, these side effects can progress to life-threatening complications, emphasizing the importance of proper usage and caution when handling the olgasis gauntlettii plant.
